{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032018041526C5B434BB8FED5C3658"}"},"total":3847},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7468716689034478360","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看的，一路走来从刚开始刚出评分（那个时候不怎么活跃哈哈哈，直到养了很久都长草之后又回来看了一遍才开始活跃也是没谁了[捂脸]）到现在9.0以上，真的很不容易，作者文笔细腻，奈落宝宝也惹人喜爱，剧情很ok，非常合我胃口的说，很值得一看！是超级值得一看！！！希望接下来的路，奈落和卡卡西两个好宝宝可以说出心里话，不要再憋着了，两个人要给我好好在一起啊喂！卡奈/奈卡99（但是我本人更吃卡奈啦）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738953677,"group_id":"7272694335362042920","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"Hello！这里是纪墨言，也可以叫我阿言。另外艾猫猫万岁！:D","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N16VLsphARVEjK5/z9+T3yDhD+D5dLZ5ZcWsD0kgiSdn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7a4e0b473dc144a186b26035ced06fa0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534680&x-signature=zesWjYnOoA%2FNXJJGSx%2FSOTpCAj0%3D","user_id":"2881197358186686","user_name":"纪墨言"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2881197358186686","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7272694335362042920","book_info":{"abstract":"【火影同人！女频！双男主！有观影！】
【主角戏精附体，有受虐表演情节，cp是卡卡西，私设多，最终可能会有真的友情变质描写，不喜勿入】
奈落穿越成宇智波奈落之后，绑定了人气达成系统，只有获得人气值才能变强。
原来这个世界已经成了“动画家”的素材库供他观测？
发生的事情都在动画家的世界制作成了《火影忍者》系列动画？
自己只有成为动画的人气角色才能变强？
对此，奈落表示，是时候给观众们表演一波了！
从渴望关爱的小男孩成长为倾倒忍界的宇智波族长，无他，唯观众爱我尔！
PS：火影很多设定和具体情节都记不清了，懒得重看，只能去网上查资料，有出入者权当私设，考究党慎入","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c5a3a935d587d476fb470cad856dc170","author":"一条熊熊毛毯","author_id":"","book_id":"7272694335362042920","book_name":"火影：靠成为美强惨配角变强","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7272694536160477730","read_count":"42078","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1408602"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"578","tags":"双男主,系统,穿越,二次元,同人,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o192f7182dcbbf3bddf74426af425218d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779185055&x-signature=t7xzYe%2BXt09BzCFRHdwFeVVklYw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3364136443718580","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"351"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032018041526C5B434BB8FED5C3658"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":51,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1751,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":35298,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":21448},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7534756414416847678","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，爱看，这是我看过最好看最喜欢的火影同人文了，强烈推荐[赞][赞][赞]（PS：卡奈什么时候破冰啊我说）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754327217,"group_id":"7272694335362042920","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"206327281883230"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7272694335362042920","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"654"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读37小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":78146,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":134595,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7533533166095844158","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看啊，内容很戳我[雀食神作]虽然知道主角是演的，但真的被感动哭了是怎么回事？[哭]有一种主角带领宇智波揭棺而起的即视感，天知道我有多喜欢宇智波的帅哥们啊！[送心]作者很有想法，主角也很会演，观影体验非常好，算是很好的观影文了[书架加一]作者大大要加油呀[码住]多多更新，根本不够看啊[求爆更]想看奈落厨被虐哭，毕竟不能只有我一个人哭[注意]想看烬的身份曝光，想看卡卡西的反应，想看木叶三小只[我也强推]最后的最后，永远支持作者大大[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":101,"s":98,"text":"观影体","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%82%E5%BD%B1%E4%BD%93&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774001055ED5C3658%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227533533166095844158%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227272694335362042920%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%82%E5%BD%B1%E4%BD%93%22%2C%22search_ unt":36,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":78144,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":132432,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8481},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601046873214649113","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"没看过火影但垂直入坑，人物活灵活现，各种描写也很有画面感，超级精彩流畅的剧情安排与叙述，草灰蛇线层层递进，论坛体也很有特点，把各推之间与剧情的互动表现得也很激动人心啊，每次看到高潮时就特期待论坛和自己的情绪共鸣，其中几个代表性人物椅子姐和呼吸中毒姐也是顶级啊（拇指）
然后就是期待奶酪速速掉马，卡奈线再不出来我就只能对不起顺顺东了，奶酪不管和谁都是这么好吃啊，对不起这真的是最后一次了顺顺东[害羞][害羞][害羞]","text_exts":[{"e":56,"s":53,"text":"论坛体","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%AE%BA%E5%9D%9B%E4%BD%93&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774001055ED5C3658%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227601046873214649113%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227272694335362042920%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%AE%BA%E5%9D%9B%E4%BD%93%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769760117,"group_id":"7272694335362042920","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱人先爱己，有魅力的主角才是好主角！！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6AB1EtjJ1vYuejGIw9iFl6GwgchT7SlspsAkrzH2A4i","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0abdb076f4dd4f8f9a0fc1572d31d3da~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534137&x-signature=uGQZGdWTu9oozh4Bon10%2FxnA7p8%3D","user_id":"3006515356396444","user_name":"瞿预"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3006515356396444","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7272694335362042920","book_info":{"abstract":"【火影同人！女频！双男主！有观影！】
